channel.title: Lane:budget_vs_upgrade on Better Water Guide
channel.description: Recent content in Lane:budget_vs_upgrade on Better Water Guide

item.title: Low-Flow vs High-Flow Whole House Water Filter: Which Is Worth the Upgrade?
item.description: The choice between low flow and high flow is not about one being good and the other being bad. It is about how much restriction your house can live with before the filter starts to feel like a bottleneck. A whole-house system should solve a water problem without making showers, laundry, and kitchen use feel awkward.
